changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.5
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS nexus
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS nexus CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.5
changeSet.comment: Create memory table mirroring SQLite memory_store schema with tenant_id
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.memory ( id BIGSERIAL NOT NULL, tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, project TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, session TEXT, agent TEXT, content TEXT NOT NULL, tags TEXT, timestamp TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ttl INTEGER, access_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_accessed TIMESTAMPTZ, CONSTRAINT memory_pk PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT memory_tenant_project_title_uq UNIQUE (tenant_id, project, title) );
-- Supporting indexes (mirror SQLite idx_memory_* indexes, tenant-scoped) CREATE INDEX idx_memory_tenant_project ON nexus.memory (tenant_id, project); CREATE INDEX idx_memory_tenant_agent ON nexus.memory (tenant_id, agent); CREATE INDEX idx_memory_tenant_timestamp ON nexus.memory (tenant_id, timestamp DESC); CREATE INDEX idx_memory_tenant_ttl_timestamp ON nexus.memory (tenant_id, ttl, timestamp);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.memory CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.5
changeSet.comment: Enable and force RLS; create tenant isolation policy
changeSet.sql:
ALTER TABLE nexus.memory ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; ALTER TABLE nexus.memory FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
-- cmd=ALL: covers SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE in one policy. -- USING predicate: filters rows on reads (SELECT / UPDATE source / DELETE source). -- WITH CHECK predicate: validates rows on writes (INSERT / UPDATE target). -- current_setting('nexus.tenant', true): missing_ok=true so unset GUC returns NULL -- rather than raising an error. NULL != any tenant_id → zero rows match. -- This is the fail-closed default: an unstamped connection sees nothing. CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON nexus.memory USING (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true)) WITH CHECK (tenant_id = current_setting('nexus.tenant', true));

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.5
changeSet.comment: Add FTS generated tsvector column (parity contract rev 2) and GIN index
changeSet.sql:
-- Generated STORED column: auto-maintained on INSERT/UPDATE, no trigger needed. -- Weights per parity contract (docs/rdr/rdr-152-fts-parity-contract.md rev 2): -- title 'A' config='english' (prose, stemmed, stopwords) -- content 'B' config='english' (prose, stemmed, stopwords) -- tags 'C' config='simple' (identifier/CSV, no stemming, no stopwords) -- COALESCE: tags is nullable; tsvector on NULL returns NULL, disrupting the ||. ALTER TABLE nexus.memory ADD COLUMN fts_vector TSVECTOR GENERATED ALWAYS AS ( setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(title, '')), 'A') || setweight(to_tsvector('english', coalesce(content, '')), 'B') || setweight(to_tsvector('simple', coalesce(tags, '')), 'C') ) STORED;
-- GIN index: accelerates @@ operator (plainto_tsquery / websearch_to_tsquery). CREATE INDEX idx_memory_fts ON nexus.memory USING GIN (fts_vector);
changeSet.rollback: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS nexus.idx_memory_fts; ALTER TABLE nexus.memory DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS fts_vector;

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.5
changeSet.comment: Grant table privileges to nexus_svc role. The nexus_svc LOGIN role is created outside Liquibase (DBA bootstrap or test @BeforeAll) so Liquibase does not require CREATEROLE privilege. This changeset is idempotent: IF EXISTS guards on the conditional GRANT make it safe to run even if the role does not exist yet, in which case the DO block logs a notice and skips gracefully. The test overrides this with svc_memory_test for hermetic isolation.
